pr.title: Record: 11L Tight SWA + VE128 + XSA4 + TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.1299)

output.summary: Tight SWA on VE128/XSA layers with late int6 QAT and test-time SGD on val tokens before sliding-window evaluation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Test-time training runs SGD for several epochs on already-evaluated validation tokens before the final sliding-window evaluation.
techniques: Tight SWA averaging over low-scale checkpoints
Test-time SGD finetuning on validation tokens before final eval
Late STE int6 QAT preceding sliding-window evaluation
